summary: Actions not pinned to SHA—critical supply chain issue (should be `actions/checkout@b4ffbf...#v4` format). sed-based JSON parsing in write_version (lines 122-126) is fragile; will fail if 'version' spans lines or whitespace varies. Missing: actionlint validation evidence, tests/bump_version.bats, test fixtures. Script lacks trap on EXIT for mktemp cleanup on error (lines 118, 166). Otherwise: solid Bash (set -euo pipefail, die(), clear subcommands), good workflow job structure (lint→bump), meaningful error messages. Regex duplication between detect_bump (lines 67-68) and changelog (lines 137-138) acceptable for different purposes.
